zh.Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, No: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert I de Saint Valery於從0977年到1008年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考時，他的父親Bernard de Ponthieu68歲，母親Emma St Valéry52歲。他於1004年之後與Papia de Normandy在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於從1011年到1069年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert I de Saint Valery于从0977年到1008年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考时，他的父亲Bernard de Ponthieu68岁，母亲Emma St Valéry52岁。他于1004年之后与Papia de Normandy在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于从1011年到1069年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Valery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Colette, Pierre, Raoul, Yva.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Valery, French form of Latin Valerius (see Valerio ).
Americanized form of Italian   Valerio   or   Valeri  .

variants.name: Vallery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Monique.
French:
habitational name from Vallery in Yonne, once a Gallo-Roman estate, recorded in 1218 as Valerianus.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ana, Manuel, Pedro, Mario, Luis, Francisco, Ramon, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Lucio, Francesco, Maurizio, Niccolo, Romeo, Vito, Amadeo, Anastasio, Aureliano, Carmela.

Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Valerio, from Latin Valerius, a Roman surname ultimately derived from Latin valere ‘to flourish, to be strong and healthy’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, among them 4th-century bishops of Trier and Zaragoza and 5th-century bishops of Sorrento and of Antibes. Compare Valery .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert I de Saint Valery was born from 0977 to 1008, in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Bernard de Ponthieu, was 68 and his mother, Emma St Valéry, was 52. He married Papia de Normandy after 1004, in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died from 1011 to 1069, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert I de Saint Valery est né du 0977 au 1008, à Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Bernard de Ponthieu, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Emma St Valéry, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Papia de Normandy après 1004, à Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé du 1011 au 1069, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert I de Saint Valery von 0977 bis 1008 in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard de Ponthieu 68 und seine Mutter Emma St Valéry 52. Er hat nach 1004 in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Papia de Normandy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb von 1011 bis 1069 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert I de Saint Valery è nato il da 0977 a 1008 nel Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard de Ponthieu, aveva 68 anni e il suo madre, Emma St Valéry, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Papia de Normandy dopo il 1004, nel Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì da 1011 a 1069, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, No: フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert I de Saint Valeryがから0977年まで1008年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックスで生まれた時，父Bernard de Ponthieuは68歳，母Emma St Valéryは52歳であった。1004年以後にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックスでPapia de Normandyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はから1011年まで1069年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert I de Saint Valery(이)가 0977년 부터 1008년 까지 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-발e리--카스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard de Ponthieu(은)는 68세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma St Valéry(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1004년 이후 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-발e리--카스에서 Papia de Normandy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1011년 부터 1069년 까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert I de Saint Valery nasceu de 0977 a 1008, em Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Bernard de Ponthieu, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Emma St Valéry, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Papia de Normandy após 1004, em Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu de 1011 a 1069, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert I de Saint Valery родился с 0977 по 1008 в местности сеинт-валeри-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard de Ponthieu было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma St Valéry, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Papia de Normandy после 1004 г. в местности сеинт-валeри-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер с 1011 по 1069 в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert I de Saint Valery nació desde 0977 hasta 1008, en Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Bernard de Ponthieu, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Emma St Valéry, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Papia de Normandy después de 1004, en Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió desde 1011 hasta 1069, en su pueblo.
